name: Chicken in Red Curry & Coconut
recipeIngredient: 2 cloves Garlic, peeled and finely chopped
4 chicken breast halves, bone in, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok: Add the oil and garlic. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
2. Add the chicken to the wok and stir-fry until well browned.
3. Add the onion and cook just until the onion is clear.
4. Set the wok aside.
5. In a 6-quart stove-top casserole, heat the coconut milk, red curry paste, salt, and fish sauce. Bring to a simmer.
6. Add the chicken and onion back into the casserole.
7. Cover and simmer until the chicken is tender, about 15 minutes.
8. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro leaves.
